kinesisvideo.signalingchannel.MessageTtl.Docs: The period of time a signaling channel retains undelivered messages before they are discarded.

kinesisvideo.signalingchannel.Name.Docs: A name for the signaling channel that you are creating. It must be unique for each AWS account and AWS Region.

kinesisvideo.signalingchannel.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).

kinesisvideo.signalingchannel.Type.Docs: A type of the signaling channel that you are creating. Currently, `SINGLE_MASTER` is the only supported channel type.
